description: OpenCortex memory hooks for Claude Code and Gemini CLI

hooks.command: node -e "const p=process.argv; const d=require('fs').existsSync(p[1]+'/hooks/run.mjs') ? p[1] : p[2]; p.splice(1,2,'run.mjs'); import(require('url').pathToFileURL(d+'/hooks/run.mjs').href)" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" "${extensionPath}" session-start

node -e "const p=process.argv; const d=require('fs').existsSync(p[1]+'/hooks/run.mjs') ? p[1] : p[2]; p.splice(1,2,'run.mjs'); import(require('url').pathToFileURL(d+'/hooks/run.mjs').href)" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" "${extensionPath}" user-prompt-submit

node -e "const p=process.argv; const d=require('fs').existsSync(p[1]+'/hooks/run.mjs') ? p[1] : p[2]; p.splice(1,2,'run.mjs'); import(require('url').pathToFileURL(d+'/hooks/run.mjs').href)" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" "${extensionPath}" stop

node -e "const p=process.argv; const d=require('fs').existsSync(p[1]+'/hooks/run.mjs') ? p[1] : p[2]; p.splice(1,2,'run.mjs'); import(require('url').pathToFileURL(d+'/hooks/run.mjs').href)" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" "${extensionPath}" session-end
